name: @radzor/api-key-auth
description: API key authentication middleware. Generate, validate, hash, and revoke API keys.

inputs.name: headerName
inputs.description: HTTP header name for API key (default: 'x-api-key')

outputs.name: validationResult
outputs.description: Result of the API key validation check.

events.name: onValidated
events.description: Fired when an API key is successfully validated.

events.name: onRevoked
events.description: Fired when an API key is revoked.

actions.name: generateKey
actions.returns: Promise<{ key: string; hash: string; keyId: string }>
actions.description: Generate a new API key. Returns the raw key (shown once) and its hash for storage.

actions.name: validateKey
actions.description: Validate a raw API key against its stored hash.

actions.name: hashKey
actions.description: Hash an API key for storage (SHA-256).

actions.name: revokeKey

params.name: keyId
params.description: ID of the key to revoke.

actions.description: Revoke an API key by ID.
